textByHash.0d998d04973de359b4b076e75817f84a34c22926: An eenteresting place to start... I am-a here, ze Queen Bee iz not. So my chair - eet iz-a here, her throne - eet iz- a not. Eez there anytheeng else? I ama a bizy fairy.
textByHash.14290a4fb0c0581bb4efa617cddcd74ee559579b: Me?! I am-a da Fairy Godfather.
textByHash.1a98fa13c388b63647a41c42f387276695cb69c0: Ze keednapper must-a have taken her through-a da fairyreengs. Dey weel-a be long gone by-a now.
textByHash.1d34b458c93f882ac257acc986cb0311d0d436f8: Essere nel panico! You-a say datta Queen Bee, she izza meesing? Theez izza terreeble! Who could-a have done such a theeng? We musta find her! I weel organise a search-a party right-a-way!
textByHash.264deea66c0c5093cbce46c79ed35875f6ac380b: Ye-es, dat izza good idea. Hokay, you may use-a da fairyreengs. Talk-a to da co-ordinator, she will-a explain-a to you how to use-a da reengs, but you must-a promees me dat you weel come-a back-a here, eef you
textByHash.29429ec2b1a74e06c2450776c38097b7c399c8a9: Ah, eet iz a trageec-a tale. Da Queen Bee she iz-a, how-you-say, seek?
textByHash.2fd8484d94a0db5a7d783f378cb0972a7f357450: A word-a of advice. You be-a careful not to cause da trouble for da folk while you are Zanaris. Ciao.
textByHash.324a42a602dcebac23a2dfaf9f54665cbce1a3f6: You tell-a me ze answer to dis, si?
textByHash.34507b0887afcd70a30cf538042ca70585617213: Yous just-a better keep-a your nose outa my business. I's da Godfather and I's da one who's inna charge here.
textByHash.42aaba14d4b4166df72a63b342269d7f495778f7: Ah, , yous hassa changed your mind? Yous weel-a come and getta me before yous rescue da Queen Bee? Only den can-a I geev yous permission to use-a da reengs.
textByHash.4897753e7909ec75c0590531ae07d66a024dd99c: me when-a yous finda da Queen Bee, like-a yous promised. Now go-a and talk-a to da co-ordinator. She-a weel tell-a yous how da fairyreengs work.
textByHash.4d937fd238b4f5748db5c0851e9fb95603542a6a: Grazie infinite! I will give-a dem to da healing fairy. Da Queen Bee, she will-a soon be strong again!
textByHash.50b83d48972aeb4c5737054cc50ba45d78768374: For why you show-a me dat? I-a busy fairy! I donn-a have time for nonsense!
textByHash.5d4afd2bd88e7dfed65fd268728296fbf03fd541: Errm...no! None atta all! Da Queen Bee, she izza well liked by-a everyone.
textByHash.5f8a8d73c1c18773ca94d0b84a2bda8e7037e7cb: I see-a by your face dat you have-a not-a heard of-a me. Irrispettoso, eet iz of no eemportance. You weesh-a to know sometheeng else or no?
textByHash.60edca9a0ae92e815f7d39de312e0d7822cfd3d9: Rocco, teach-a thees thief a lesson!
textByHash.70d4fa8acdaece80dbea2b2fd36243edf5289d3f: Good. Now-a yous talk-a to da co-ordinator. She will-a tell you how-a da fairyreengs work.
textByHash.758484f1898de58078045d19685a6c46f38e57a2: Good, I knew-a you would change-a your mind. Now I just-a need you to sign-a dis scroll before I geev-a yous da permission to use-a da fairyreengs.
textByHash.7940fb0d7f639883ab4ffa2844803ca93d5fd6be: You tell-a me your answer, si?
textByHash.7b74d2ed2a20de247082d7b3e77c12e228286a4f: For why you show-a me dat? Eez very nice to see yous learning to draw! Bravo!
textByHash.8c26531f246f4d752d94b7d8214b11890dbe8cee: Yous weel change-a your mind. Come and talk-a to me me yous do.
textByHash.8f09ce26d4656a36a9c1b868d00cbf6a42f8e2be: Well, let-a me enlighten yous. Zanaris iz-a a nexus of-a da worlds. Da Queen Bee, she iz-a da guardian of-a all da folk dat live-a in Zanaris.
textByHash.91b586bc4a0fef462e27fd3c529f6ba6b969d4ce: find-a her. Whoever keednapped her must-a be very powerful. You find-a da Queen Bee and den-a yous come right back here and we will-a rescue her together. Hokay?
textByHash.9831e85f4d5e90d052e5290d69d17db594cf8a13: Eef there iz anytheeng I can-a help you weeth whilst you are-a veesiting Zanaris, plsi, do not-a trouble to bother me.
textByHash.98458ab9cd17604262e0a6e30d29958dd02a2b5f: Ciao esploratore! So many questions. Whicha one would you hava me answer first?
textByHash.a45a6f4c25e56b631d77bb6d86664bc07eb0e2ce: Eet does? Oh, sorry, must-a geeven yous da wrong-a scroll. Tell-a yous what, yous hazza da honest face, so I'll trust-a yous. Go ahead, use-a da fairyreengs, but just-a make sure dat yous come-a back here and tell-a
textByHash.acaf766f1c7764fb1400b6b8fa0c243db33aca98: No, but-a dat iz da question I answered. Now iz-a dere anything else?
textByHash.b765d479856367483aafc1d22845260b99b70486: So when-a thees Tanglefoot arrives, da Queen Bee she-a goes to da Cosmic Temple area to kill-a eet, but someting goes-a wrong. Da Queen Bee, she gets-a hurt and is-a now inna da magic sleep.
textByHash.cab3bc300e4cb4166a0f1128bf3aadef7e904fd2: , you are-a back! Have-a you found da Queen Bee?
textByHash.cd8c0616ba361c016daadb5089f893001c833993: Ah, iz-a you. I make-a you an offer, eh? Iz-a good offer. You can't-a refuse it.
textByHash.cdb5f125d9030cb5f133fd2229b4847981e4dd3f: Ben fatto, my friend! Da folk-a dey owe yous a great-a deal! So did-a youss getta back da Queen Bee's magic power?
textByHash.cf63fa0ffb8ccf87611f16b7a230111f3ecdede0: Hmm, an eenteresting question, my friend. I am-a trying to run-a da fairy kingdom, and youz iz-a being da irritating adventurer.
textByHash.d4ac2c28254cc1f91b03a1232f442ed9d6801c0e: Den whatta are you doing-a back here? Go and-a search for her!
textByHash.d61b261046310fcfd4b62b0ade11ca835eb675ba: Ah, a tragedy to be-a struck-a down so young.
textByHash.e9c58f4078040e74d56b3ebddea31737f67d1fe5: Oh no, dat eet eez no good. Yous wanna to be da hero, but what-a about me? She izza my queen! No, no. You cannot-a use-a da fairyreengs
textByHash.edeb8ad70b7a2cb76fac4ed6324be8792e9f8307: Yes! We must-a, but most-a of da folk are away from Zanaris atta the momento.
textByHash.f40bff991b68707c9b1a7c4a90cd10d53448f9d5: How-a much do ya know about-a da fairy folk, my beeg friend?
textByHash.f50d259ee2b7f4faf346e18ca27f1453f97b4560: Ciao . I am-a glad to see-a yous back! I was-a worried that the Tanglefoot would-a kill-a you too.
textByHash.f9c14df4830f02e130e164a02dcb61ac866e894a: Da people are mostly out-a and about-a tryeeng to keep-a theengs working. Eet izza not easy weeth da Queen Bee notta here!
